channel.title: Javascript on giordii
channel.description: Recent content in Javascript on giordii

item.title: XSS Escape — Breaking Out of a Script String Context
item.description: Escape a JavaScript string context inside a script tag by injecting a closing script tag that the sanitizer fails to block.

item.title: Just a Reminder — Obfuscated JS Secret Key Recovery
item.description: The login form runs client-side JS. Deobfuscating or inspecting it reveals a hardcoded secret key used to AES-decrypt the flag — the key is plaintext at the top of the obfuscated script.
